changes.title: Name glow
changes.description: Sender names now render a CSS text-shadow glow when nameGlowColor and/or nameGlowPreset are set in appearance.json. Four presets available: soft (single diffuse glow), strong (tight core + wide diffuse), halo (ambient bloom), bloom (three-layer spread). Glow thickness is controlled by nameGlowThickness (default 8px). Presets override individual nameGlowColor if both are set.

changes.title: Name text-stroke outline
changes.description: Sender names render a -webkit-text-stroke outline when nameOutlineColor and nameOutlineStyle (solid only in this version) are set. Thickness is controlled by nameOutlineThickness. Complex styles (double, gradient, dashed-anim) are logged via diagLog and deferred to a future version.

changes.title: Name highlight background
changes.description: Sender names render a colored background pill when nameHighlightColor is set. The pill uses border-radius:3px and 0 2px padding for a subtle tag-like appearance. Useful for VIP, staff, or event participants.

changes.title: _applyNameDecorations(spanEl, uid) helper
changes.description: New helper function that resets and re-applies all name decorations (glow, outline, highlight) from the appearance cache. Idempotent — always resets CSS properties before applying to avoid stale compound styles. Called from both createMessageElement (initial render) and _propagateAppearanceChange (real-time propagation).
